import { useNavigate } from "react-router-dom"; import "./Dashboard.css"; function Dashboard() { const navigate = useNavigate(); const books = [ { id: 1, title: "React untuk Pemula", author: "John Smith", price: "Rp 150.000", image: "https://via.placeholder.com/200x280?text=React+Book", category: "Teknologi" }, { id: 2, title: "Web Development Master", author: "Jane Doe", price: "Rp 200.000", image: "https://via.placeholder.com/200x280?text=Web+Dev", category: "Teknologi" }, { id: 3, title: "JavaScript Handbook", author: "Mike Johnson", price: "Rp 180.000", image: "https://via.placeholder.com/200x280?text=JavaScript", category: "Pemrograman" }, { id: 4, title: "CSS & Design Patterns", author: "Sarah Williams", price: "Rp 160.000", image: "https://via.placeholder.com/200x280?text=CSS+Design", category: "Design" }, { id: 5, title: "Database Management", author: "David Brown", price: "Rp 220.000", image: "https://via.placeholder.com/200x280?text=Database", category: "Database" }, { id: 6, title: "Mobile App Development", author: "Emma Davis", price: "Rp 210.000", image: "https://via.placeholder.com/200x280?text=Mobile+App", category: "Mobile" } ]; const handleLogout = () => { navigate("/"); }; return (
